name: Ethos Golf - Frisco
about: Ethos Golf is an indoor golf training studio offering facilities in Frisco and Allen, Texas. The venue features advanced technology including immersive curved golf simulators and a SportsBox 3D Studio for precise biomechanical swing analysis. Membership is required for access, priced at $239 per month with a 90-day minimum commitment and unlimited 24-hour access. The facilities are designed for serious practice with features like detailed game tracking and feedback on world-renowned courses.
why_golfers_like_it: 3D biomechanical swing analysis using SportsBox 3D Studio
24-hour member access with up to 2-hour reservations per day
Access to world-renowned courses with detailed game tracking
Curved simulator screens for immersive playing experience
